channel.title: API changes review for Gson
channel.description: Binary compatibility analysis reports for Gson

item.title: Gson 2.8.6
item.description: Binary compatibility: 100%, added 3 methods. Source compatibility: 100%.

item.title: Gson 1.4
item.description: Binary compatibility: 66.7%, 10 problems, added 73 methods, removed 11 methods. Source compatibility: 65.8%, 21 problems.
